title: Citrusy Fluffy French Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A delicious one-pot meal that combines the citrusy flavors of lemons and limes with the crunchiness of pistachios, served as a keto-friendly breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 30g almond flour
ingredients.notes: Use in place of eggs for a light, fluffy texture

instructions: Mix almond flour, lemon zest, lemon juice, chopped pistachios, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes in a mixing bowl until well combined.
Pour the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread evenly into a thin layer. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Optional: Serve warm as a breakfast snack, or use as a topping for Greek yogurt or avocado toast.
